textByHash.a383c003a2e20987181a38bbf9c5987ab54d5d99: Be careful going in there! You are unarmed, and there is much evilness lurking down there! The evilness seems to block off our contact with our gods,
textByHash.eec09332dc4f235fd10649b6f4c1be4c8c03e431: The only exit from the caves below is a portal which leads only to the deepest wilderness!
textByHash.fb3be02426ca599c4edc0459a293df953dd32f73: so our prayers seem to have less effect down there. Oh, also, you won't be able to come back this way - This ladder only goes one way!
